## Checklist 📋

- [ ] One PR = one change
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` and `go test -race -count=1 ./...` pass
- [ ] `npm run check` and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] No new dependencies without justification
